creator: rom_glsa@ein-hashofet.co.il
text:
x11-toolkits/gtk11 builds and installs fine,
yet when I try to link against it I get
the following error:
/usr/X11R6/lib/libgtk11.so: undefined reference to `_Xsetlocale'

Note: I have x11-toolkits/gtk (1.0.6) installed as well. This
might be the cause.

CVsupped on sunday.

thanks -- Gilad.
